message:
fix(policy): suppress calibration breach log spam and guard trigger deadlock

- Only log calibration breach at first threshold (25), not every multiple
- Require 30+ observations before guard drift alarm can trigger FallbackSafe
- Prevents fresh/uncalibrated guard from creating fallback deadlock on startup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
